mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tickets ( id, project_id, workflow_id, ticket_number, title, description, type, priority, stage, assignee_id, reporter_id, branch_id, due_date, story_points, labels_json, custom_fields_json, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler}, #{projectId, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler}, #{workflowId, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler}, #{ticketNumber}, #{title}, #{description}, #{type, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{priority, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{stage, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, #{assigneeId, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler}, #{reporterId, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler}, #{branchId, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler}, #{dueDate}, #{storyPoints}, #{labelsJson}::jsonb, #{customFieldsJson}::jsonb, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tickets SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, type = #{type, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, priority = #{priority, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, stage = #{stage, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.EnumTypeHandler}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler}, branch_id = #{branchId, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler}, due_date = #{dueDate}, story_points = #{storyPoints}, labels_json = #{labelsJson}::jsonb, custom_fields_json = #{customFieldsJson}::jsonb, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tickets WHERE project_id = #{projectId, typeHandler=com.runnershigh.tps.adapter.out.persistence.typehandler.UuidTypeHandler} AND due_date < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND stage NOT IN ('DONE', 'DEPLOYED') ORDER BY due_date, priority
